title: Chart with multiple boards connected and 2 sets of data showing on Y axis

posts.author: mazzykane (Martina Salotti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I’m trying to build a chart to visualize time spent v. time tracked from multiple boards at once - like this:

image785×465 17.2 KB

The boards are all correctly set to show the data I want to see, and it is possible to achieve this when creating a chart for one single board by selecting which columns you’d like to pull the data from - like this:

When connecting multiple boards to the chart, the Y axis options only let you choose one column to pull the data from - like this:

Is there really NO WAY of having a chart with two sets of data for multiple boards, or am I just missing something?

posts.author: wintrmute (Toby)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Martina,
did you ever figure out a solution for this?

posts.author: michalia (michael liarzi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Is there an answer for this feature. it would be helpful to use. I am Struggling to show an Average Salary in one column VS. Overtime paid per a division
